title: Marco Paul 30cm FrostPine Christmas Wreath - Artificial Pinecone Wreath with Frosted Tips, Greenery & White Accents - Rustic Front Door Wreath, Indoor Christmas Decorations Reusable Winter Door Décor
features: 30cm Christmas Wreath for Front Door Decoration - This 30cm FrostPine wreath is perfectly sized for front doors, walls or fireplaces. A festive addition to indoor Christmas decorations with rustic charm.

Artificial Christmas Wreath with Pinecones & Frosted Tips - Made with natural-look pinecones, frosted white details and sprigs of greenery. A traditional Christmas wreath that delivers timeless rustic style.

Reusable Winter Wreaths for Front Door & Home - Built from durable materials, this artificial wreath is reusable year after year. A practical winter wreath that won’t wilt, fade or lose its seasonal beauty.
Indoor Christmas Decorations & Outdoor Door Wreaths - Designed for versatility, this Christmas door wreath works both indoors and outdoors. Ideal for porches, hallways, fireplaces and dining rooms.

Easy Hanging Christmas Door Décor - Lightweight and complete with a hanging loop, this wreath is simple to display. Pair with poinsettia Christmas decorations, red Christmas decorations or Christmas flowers for a coordinated look.
description: Welcome festive guests with the Marco Paul 30cm FrostPine Christmas Wreath, a rustic decoration designed to capture the spirit of the season. This wreath combines natural-look pinecones, frosted white accents and sprigs of greenery for a snowy winter effect. Measuring 30cm, it is the perfect size for use as a front door wreath, wall decoration or fireplace feature, instantly adding charm to your Christmas decorations. Crafted from durable artificial materials, the wreath is designed for reuse year after year. Unlike real foliage, it won’t fade, wilt or shed, ensuring a long-lasting and practical Christmas decoration that always looks fresh. Its rustic design makes it suitable for both traditional and modern festive themes. Lightweight and easy to hang with the built-in loop, the FrostPine wreath is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Use it to decorate your front door, porch, hallway or dining room, or combine it with poinsettia Christmas decorations, Christmas flowers or other festive décor for a coordinated seasonal look.
